data.title: OpenAI boosts education efforts with new AI tools, certifications: 900M weekly ChatGPT users; certifications at top universities; closes 90-99% AI capability gap.
data.description: OpenAI has reported a significant milestone with a total of 900 million users engaging with ChatGPT on a weekly basis. The company has also initiated certification pilot programs at prominent universities. Additionally, OpenAI has introduced new tools aimed at addressing the 90-99% gap in AI capability among students. These efforts are part of the company's strategy to enhance AI education and accessibility.

data.title: 7-Eleven, Inc. Gives Customers a Boost with Energizing Sips for Daylight Saving Time
data.description: Get ready to embrace the spring season with a variety of refreshing drinks that will help you power through the time change brought about by daylight saving time. Located in Irving, Texas, 7-Eleven, Inc. is offering a range of energizing beverages to keep customers fueled. Whether you are looking to kickstart your day or simply looking for a tasty treat, these new drinks are designed to help you navigate through the transition smoothly. Visit 7-Eleven for these revitalizing sips and say goodbye to feeling groggy after losing an hour of sleep. Time to recharge with the perfect beverages!

data.title: In HelloNation, Roofing Expert Keith Miller of Gainesville, GA, Explains Whether Roof Moss Signals a Bigger Problem
data.description: In Gainesville, Georgia, on March 5, 2026, a recent article from HelloNation with input from Keith Miller of Division Kangaroof sheds light on the significance of roof moss appearing on shingles. The piece discusses the formation of roof moss and highlights why it tends to be more prevalent in humid climates.

data.title: NYSE Owner Intercontinental Exchange Invests In OKX At $25B Valuation, Token Spikes 50%
data.description: ICE has acquired a stake in OKX, valuing the crypto exchange at $25 billion and securing a board seat. The news led to OKX's native token OKB surging by approximately 50%, reaching $120 before retracting to $92. The collaboration began following a meeting between OKX's Haider Rafique and ICE's Jeffrey Sprecher which reportedly lasted four hours. OKX's 120 million users will now have access to ICE's U.S. futures and tokenized equities markets, set to launch in the latter part of 2026. Additionally, ICE will use OKX's spot crypto prices for U.S.-regulated crypto futures contracts. Sprecher believes this partnership will expedite their plans.

data.title: CANTINA CONTRAMAR AT FONTAINEBLEAU LAS VEGAS NOW ACCEPTING RESERVATIONS AHEAD OF MARCH 28 GRAND OPENING
data.description: Renowned chef Gabriela Cámara has released a sneak peek of the menu for the upcoming Mexican hotspot in LAS VEGAS. Scheduled to open on March 28, 2026, Cantina Contramar is now taking reservations for the grand opening. Chef Cámara's latest venture promises unique Mexican flavors and culinary experiences for guests eagerly anticipating the launch.

data.title: Roboze Secures Investment from Rule 1 Ventures to Accelerate AI-Driven Distributed Manufacturing for Defense and Critical Infrastructure
data.description: Roboze has received substantial funding to enhance its innovative manufacturing platform that integrates Physical AI, materials science, and additive manufacturing systems in various regions including the U.S., Europe, and the Middle East. The funding will support the expansion of Roboze's operations and technologies in these key markets. This funding signifies a significant milestone for Roboze as it continues to grow and revolutionize the manufacturing industry. The company aims to expand its reach and impact, further solidifying its position as a leader in advanced manufacturing.

data.title: webAI Selected as Industry Partner for U.S. Army's Project ARIA, Delivering Sovereign AI Capabilities to the Tactical Edge
data.description: In an effort to enhance military operations and provide advanced tools for soldiers, webAI has become part of a coalition alongside top technology firms. This initiative, established on March 5, 2026, aims to modernize Army operations by harnessing the power of artificial intelligence. webAI, known for its robust AI platform designed for vital scenarios, has officially joined this collaborative effort.

data.title: Broadcom Shows AI Infrastructure Spending Remains Strong
data.description: Broadcom has allayed worries about the AI infrastructure growth potentially slowing down, by showcasing robust fiscal Q1 results and optimistic guidance. This indicates that the investment in AI infrastructure remains strong, as evidenced by Broadcom's performance.

data.title: Bitcoin Surges 7%, But The March Rally May Just Be A Textbook Bull Trap
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has increased by 7% this month, according to macro analyst Benjamin Cowen who warns of a potential "bull trap" similar to previous midterm cycles. Bitcoin is currently trading 15% below its yearly open of $87,500, hitting the expected target for a relief rally in early March. Cowen notes that Bitcoin's price movement in 2026 closely resembles post-halving patterns seen in 2014, 2018, and 2022. The recurring structural pattern shows Bitcoin peaking in Q4 of the post-halving year, which is expected to be late 2025 this cycle. The cryptocurrency typically establishes local lows in early and late February, with this cycle seeing BTC hitting lower lows at $80,000 and $60,000 before experiencing a March bull trap. This trap involves a sharp counter-trend rally inducing FOMO and spiking the price.
